articles.description: Tottenham Hotspur want to convince Roberto de Zerbi to become their new permanent head coach, after the departure of interim boss Igor Tudor.
articles.title: Roberto de Zerbi: Tottenham want Italian as next permanent head coach

articles.description: Golf correspondent Iain Carter assesses what the impact of Tiger Woods' latest crash might be on his roles in golf.
articles.title: Tiger Woods: Will crash shake golf from its dependency on the star?

articles.description: England manager Thomas Tuchel says he is not disappointed with the players who have pulled out of the squad for Tuesday's friendly against Japan.
articles.title: England: Thomas Tuchel not angry with eight withdrawals for Japan friendly

articles.description: Uefa is to expected to broadly freeze prices at Euro 2028 - meaning supporters would be able to buy five tickets for the cost of one parking space at a World Cup stadium this summer.
articles.title: Five Euro 2028 tickets 'cost same as World Cup parking space'

articles.description: DR Congo face Jamaica in a World Cup play-off, hoping to reach the tournament for the first time since 1974, a campaign memorable for the wrong reasons.
articles.title: DR Congo vs Jamaica: World Cup play-off sees Leopards bid to end 52-year absence

articles.description: A return to Formula 1 will be difficult for former Red Bull team principal Christian Horner because he has "broken quite a lot of glass", says ex-Mercedes rival Toto Wolff.
articles.title: Christian Horner return to F1 difficult - Toto Wolff

articles.description: Chelsea midfielder Enzo Fernandez is on Real Madrid's shortlist, Juventus are eyeing Manchester United's Manuel Ugarte, Newcastle receive a boost in their bid to keep hold of Sandro Tonali, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Fernendez, Ugarte, Rodri, Wharton, Tonali, Ake, Torres, Livramento

articles.description: Premier League games being moved to Friday or Monday are a headache for the fans of some clubs. Is the system fair, and how does it work for Sky?
articles.title: Sky Sports TV picks: How they work & why they are headache for fans

articles.description: Deniz Undav comes off the bench to score a late winner as Germany edge out Ghana 2-1 in a friendly in Stuttgart.
articles.title: Germany 2-1 Ghana: Undav scores winner in Stuttgart friendly

articles.description: England women's head coach Charlotte Edwards says her players have "100%" been able to address issues surrounding their fitness.
articles.title: Charlotte Edwards: England women's head coach says players have '100%' addressed issues over fitness
